== Notes for [[Item:Q105022|Q105022]] ==

"'''México, Distrito Federal, registros parroquiales y diocesanos, 1514-1970'''", database with images, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:QJ8Y-114N : 28 July 2015), Antonio de la Mota de Portugal, 1578. ... Name: '''Antonio de la Mota de Portugal'''; Event Type: '''Baptism'''; Event Date: '''04 Jun 1578'''Event Place: '''Asunción Sagrario Metropolitano, Centro, Distrito Federal, Mexico'''; Gender: Male; Father's Name: Antonio de la Mota; Mother's Name: Maria de Portugal

See a '''photograph of Antonio's original Baptism Record''' on his profile's "Media/Documents" page.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000012546340449

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
